On this page

users — client.users ​

Look up other users in the current app. The signed-in user lives on me.

getBasic(userId) ​

One user's basic public profile by id.

ts
const user = await client.users.getBasic(userId);
swift
let user = try await client.users.getBasic(userId: userId)

getProfiles(ids) ​

Batch-fetch several basic profiles in one round-trip.

ts
const profiles = await client.users.getProfiles(ids);
swift
let profiles = try await client.users.getProfiles(userIds: ids)

lookup(email) ​

Find a user by email address.

ts
const user = await client.users.lookup(email);
swift
let user = try await client.users.lookup(email: email)
